use_cases: Hero section for tech product landing pages and SaaS websites
Product showcase component for software feature demonstrations
Premium landing page visual element for developer tools and apps
Animated product reveal in marketing campaigns and presentations
Interactive product preview in e-commerce tech product listings
ai_summary: A 3D animated MacBook Air visualization component built with React and CSS 3D transforms. Features perspective-based rendering, layered animations for device rotation and lid opening, and realistic keyboard key animations. Uses CSS custom properties for animation states and transforms with preserve-3d for authentic depth. Ideal for hero sections, product showcases, and premium landing pages in tech and SaaS contexts.
